title: Audio Distribution Type
description: Declared audio distribution classification for radio, streaming-audio, podcast, and other audio inventory, using IAB Tech Lab/OpenRTB 2.6 audio.feed definitions with AdCP-native value names. This is seller-declared discovery metadata, not independent verification of inventory quality or delivery context.

enumDescriptions.fm_am_broadcast: OpenRTB 2.6 audio.feed=2: FM/AM broadcast, including live content broadcast over the air and also available via online streaming.
enumDescriptions.podcast: OpenRTB 2.6 audio.feed=3: original, pre-recorded content distributed as episodes in a series.
enumDescriptions.catch_up_radio: OpenRTB 2.6 audio.feed=4: recorded segment of a radio show that was originally broadcast live.
enumDescriptions.web_radio: OpenRTB 2.6 audio.feed=5: live audio content only available via online streaming, not as FM/AM broadcast.
enumDescriptions.video_game: OpenRTB 2.6 audio.feed=6: background audio in video games.
enumDescriptions.text_to_speech: OpenRTB 2.6 audio.feed=7: text-to-speech audio such as audio books or website/plugin article narration.
